page_metadata.biotools__summary: BC_subtyping allows the stratification of breast cancer (BC) expression profiles from RNA-seq data into intrinsic molecular subtypes using improved versions of the dataset-level PAM50 test or single-sample machine learning-based classifiers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BC_subtyping allows the stratification of breast cancer (BC) expression profiles from RNA-seq data into intrinsic molecular subtypes using improved versions of the dataset-level PAM50 test or single-sample machine learning-based classifiers.
